text.message: Oh wait nvm, I played with a dude named Hweee a few games ago and mistook them for you
They kept telling us they were eating and not paying attention to the match lol
im open to leaving you the 9 12
if you give me a 2 for 1 with an ore
Oof that is a game altering discrd
Black I wasn't eyeing the plow but I respect the safety measures nonetheless
green has every resourse and 2 city.. think its game..
I think we all know an early lead can backfire ;)
But yeah I'm looking decent, should be a good one
block 6 so he cant go crazy on devs now
Nah I'm just messing with you im a dude lol
Ignoring red on that solo rob was brutal
i guess i can take road
If red does we are toast
can i get a wool for my troubles?
How is locking down longest for yourself troubles?
i have no chancde.. have to build to 10..
can i get a wool for that maneuver at least
Wanted to keep red above 7 resources when I stole
I can offer you a road
how many vps do u have blue?
Blue got two VPs fosho lmao
You can lie blue it's okay
Say you don't have the VPs
If a 7 rolls I am cooked
Honestly if they mono'd sheep I would have still won
